items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario behavior of blocking an emergency slot, but there is no direct evidence provided that demonstrates this behavior or its expected outcome. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as customer sign-up and booking, but do not include any specific validations related to the emergency slot blocking scenario. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is met.
